scripts.build:artifacts: node -e 'const {execSync}=require(`child_process`);for (const [dir,name] of [[`database`,`database:build`],[`packages/gurmukhi/bindings/javascript`,`build`]]){let pkg;try{pkg=require(`./${dir}/package.json`)}catch(e){console.warn(`[build:artifacts] skip ${dir}: no package.json`);continue}if(pkg.scripts && pkg.scripts[name]){console.log(`[build:artifacts] ${dir} -> ${name}`);execSync(`bun run ${name}`,{cwd:dir,stdio:`inherit`})}else{console.warn(`[build:artifacts] skip ${dir}: no "${name}" script`)}}'
